title: carex lanceolata var. subpediformis
intro: Carex lanceolata var. subpediformis, also known as the variable sedge, is a type of flowering plant that belongs to the Carex genus and is native to North America. This plant has been traditionally used in herbal medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antioxidant effects. The health benefits of Carex lanceolata var. subpediformis include reducing inflammation, improving digestion, and supporting respiratory health. The plant can be prepared as a tea or infusion, or used in tinctures or salves, making it a versatile ingredient in herbal remedies.
